problem id: 4ba4a7ec
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  00001101 -> 00111111
  11110111 -> 10111111
  10110111 -> 10111111
  00110101 -> 00111111
  00111101 -> 00111111
  01001100 -> 11111111
  10010101 -> 00111111
  11001010 -> 01111111
  00010001 -> 00111111
  11011101 -> 00111111

query: 11000010
predicted answer: 01111111
